name: Corporate Presentation: Digital Innovation Strategy 2025
description: 45-minute keynote presentation logistics coordination: AV setup, slide testing, speaker prep, audience management, Q&A facilitation, and post-event activities for 200 attendees

resourceConstraints.description: 2 AV technicians for setup and support

steps.name: Auditorium Setup
steps.description: Set up seating for 200, test lighting, prepare registration area, position signage

steps.name: Audio/Visual System Setup
steps.description: Connect projectors, test wireless microphone, verify laptop connections, backup systems ready

steps.name: Load Presentation Slides
steps.description: Load Digital Innovation Strategy 2025 slide deck, create backup copies on multiple devices

steps.name: Technical Rehearsal
steps.description: Full run-through of slides, test clicker, verify all 16 slides display correctly, audio levels

steps.name: Speaker Briefing & Setup
steps.description: Review timing (45min + 15min Q&A), test microphone, verify slide transitions, final prep

steps.name: Slide Deck Walkthrough
steps.description: Speaker reviews all 16 slides on presentation system, practices transitions, timing check

steps.name: Final Speaker Preparation
steps.description: Last-minute questions, water setup, backup materials ready, introduction cards prepared

steps.name: Attendee Registration
steps.description: Check-in 200 attendees, distribute materials, networking pre-session

steps.name: Audience Seating
steps.description: Guide attendees to seats, distribute handouts, final audio check with audience present

steps.name: Opening Remarks & Introduction
steps.description: Welcome attendees, introduce speaker background, set expectations for session

steps.name: Agenda Overview (Slide 2)
steps.description: Present 5-section agenda: Market Landscape, Framework, Roadmap, Outcomes, Q&A

steps.name: Market Landscape Section (Slides 3-4)
steps.description: Current market trends, competitive pressures, opportunity windows (10 min section)

steps.name: Digital Transformation Framework (Slides 5-7)
steps.description: 3 pillars: Technology Infrastructure, Process Optimization, Human Capital (15 min section)

steps.name: Implementation Roadmap (Slides 8-10)
steps.description: 3-phase approach, resource requirements, timeline visualization (10 min section)

steps.name: Expected Outcomes & Impact (Slides 11-13)
steps.description: Success metrics, business impact, competitive advantages (5 min section)

steps.name: Next Steps (Slide 14)
steps.description: Immediate actions (30 days) and short-term goals (90 days)

steps.name: Transition to Q&A
steps.description: Set up microphones for audience questions, explain Q&A format, moderate session

steps.name: Questions & Discussion
steps.description: 15-minute interactive Q&A covering implementation, priorities, risks, timeline

steps.name: Closing Remarks (Slide 16)
steps.description: Thank attendees, provide contact information, mention follow-up materials

steps.name: Immediate Follow-up
steps.description: Collect feedback forms, handle immediate questions, network with key attendees

steps.name: Materials Distribution
steps.description: Share slide deck and detailed roadmap with attendees within 24 hours (as promised)

steps.name: Venue Breakdown
steps.description: Pack up AV equipment, restore venue setup, secure presentation materials
